one_time_description: Crown Indigenous Relations payment received in prior year (2022) - $7,597,537 non-recurring transfer; also First Nations Drinking Water Settlement of $500,000 in 2023
economic_notes: Band operates Teck HVC Partnership arrangement generating $263,952. Contingently liable as covenantor on Kwoiek Creek Resources LP term loan up to $3,100,000. ISC funding represents 25% of revenue in 2023 vs 10% in 2022. Controlled entities include Kanaka Bar Land and Resources LP, Kanaka Bar Land and Resources Inc., and KBES Services LLP accounted for on modified equity basis.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Three government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis: Kanaka Bar Land and Resources LP (99%), Kanaka Bar Land and Resources Inc. (100%), KBES Services LLP (99%). Five segments fully consolidated. Prior year 2022 included large non-recurring Crown Indigenous Relations transfer of $7,597,537. Prior year restated for depreciation adjustment of $11,517. First Nations Drinking Water Settlement of $500,000 is a one-time item in 2023. No schedule of remuneration for chief/council/staff disclosed. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $1,683,866 + Province of BC $1,350,246 + Government of Canada $739,075 + First Nations Health Authority $419,705 + CMHC $3,120 + First Nations Drinking Water Settlement $500,000 + BC Hydro $111,684 - noting some overlap with share of income from controlled entities excluded. OSR calculated as total revenue minus government transfers.
